title: EZCRA Easy Arts & Crafts for Kids - Fun Gem Sticker Kit - 8 Unicorn Princess Themes, 990+ Stickers - Diamond Art Kits for Boys & Girls Age 3-8
features: 💛Perfect for Kids💛 Unleash your child's creativity with our Mess Free Gem Sticker Kit. Our sticker kit encourages imaginative thinking and artistic expression, which sparks endless combination and hours of creative play.
✅Safe for your kid✅ All material used are non-toxic and free from harmful chemicals. All our products are tested and comply with the higest level of safety standards.
🌟No Mess, Easy-to-Follow Instructions🌟 This sticker kit provides a mess-free crafting experience, inluding easy-to-follow instructions that allow children to create and play without any hassle.
🦄8 Easy Projects🌸 This kit includes: 990+ Gem Stickers, 8 Projects with cute and exciting theme such as Uniron, Princess, Mermaid and Butterfly

😎Display your Work😎 A cardboard easel and hanger are included, allowing chilren to proudly display their creations. The easel provides a convenient and stable platform for showcasing, while then hanger offers an easy way to hang the creations on a wall or door.
👻For Kids Age 3-8👻 Suitable for kids that are 3-8 years old, this sticket kit provides a engaging way for children to explore their creativityy while honing their hand-eye coordination skills.

🥰30-Day Guarantee🥰 Shop confidently with our 30 days hassle-free returns, in case your are not satified with our product in any way. If you come across any questions or queries about the product, material or anything else, feel free to reach out to our 24/7 support team.
